# Sunil Prakash Singh

## Profile
AI transformation and platform strategy leader focused on enterprise-scale delivery in regulated environments.

## Current Role
- Vice President, Cloud & Platform Architecture, Deutsche Bank (2021-present)

## Leadership Focus
- Enterprise AI strategy and operating models
- Platform and data transformation
- AI governance, controls, and production readiness
- Cross-functional execution across engineering, product, and risk stakeholders

## Career Highlights
- Deutsche Bank: modernization of legacy estates to cloud-native platforms and enterprise data foundations
- Halialabs: scaled NLP and deep learning systems with end-to-end AI lifecycle practices
- Cognizant: architecture and delivery governance across enterprise programs

## Education & Credentials
- PGPMAX (Executive MBA), Indian School of Business (in progress)
- M.Tech, Enterprise Business Analytics, National University of Singapore
- B.E., Computer Science, RGTU, India
- Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect
